This property presents a facade of an up to date hotel It is definitely NOT what it appears to be The reception staff three individuals at different times became surly and argumentative when I had to correct their wrong assumption They also had no explanation why the room was not ready on check in past the stipulated time 15 00 The cleaning staff is unaware that if you place the Please Clean Now sign on the door at 8 00 am you have the right to expect that at 15 00 the room will be clean The room was dirty candy in the shape of hearts were in the corner perhaps left from Valentine s Day this was early August Also the housekeeping person failed on three of the four days to replace the Body Wash and Shampoo even though the empty bottles were in full view The housekeeper also failed to replenish the notepad even though it had been only used to indicate that the four euro on it were for her The beds do not have electrical outlets so if you use a CPAP machine or other devise you are out of luck unless you bring your own extension cord The shower was so constructed that a person slightly larger than average size could not enter it Someone had obviously ordered the glass partitions without measuring the opening There was no coffee maker in what was described as a premium room only a water heater with instant coffee Who drinks instant coffee in 2016 The website for the hotel advertises a refrigerator in the room but going back to my original comment concerning the facade that is created the refrigerator in the room was so filled with their overpriced items that you could not place even the smallest item of your own in there They had even removed the shelves on the door to crowd more of their items in it All in all this was a hotel to be avoided To be clear I have stayed in other NH hotels in Amsterdam Brussels and Berlin I certainly hope that this property is an enigma   The location was great in the city center as the name implies

size of rooms were very small once booked we were not told up front of the bed selection when we arrived a couple we were told there were twin beds and no standards the hotel was very nice and worked with us to accommodate but very disappointing this was not recognized   great new renovation and the location was walking distance from a variety of places Very quiet and great views on the canal

nothing   Location of the hotel is amazing and near to many places like Dam Square and in the same area you can find plenty of restaurants Room size was more than perfect for family of 4 members almost each one in a separate bed very big room enough for many luggage very clean room and they care about everything
The bar as such closes quite early but there are lots of places nearby   The staff were marvellously friendly without exception Comfy beds very nice rooms a great location
Small room staff not helpful arrived for 10am check in then was told the room wouldn t be available until 1 arrived back at 1 then waited for another hour and a half   Cleanliness that s about it

There was often litter on entrance steps which gives a bad first impression People smoke there and just drop their cigarette butts on the steps  The bed was so comfortable I would like to ave brought it home with me

Weird layout of room Eg side of bed close to wall Reserve deposit Charged to our credit card as well as our final payment so we were charged twice   Excellent locattion and a good modern hotellrecommended but check the bill

Our room wasn t cleaned after our first night When we left the hotel to go out at 5 30pm we requested that someone do so but when we came back at 10pm it still hadn t been cleaned I complained and found the staff very unhelpful considering the situation The next day by 4pm it still hadn t been cleaned even though we had a cleaning sign up on our door since 8am and when to went to complain there were no apologies only more rude attitudes It was finally cleaned once in three days but I feel the hotel really dropped the ball here and it made the stay unpleasant Another thing was that upon check in we were told that they had no more double rooms and that we could take two single beds We had requested a double room and were disappointed but apparently it s not guaranteed Our other option was to upgrade which was fine because the superior room was lovely but it did feel a bit forced at check in and left a bit of a sour taste I would recommend the hotel but they really need to check in on the cleaning issue and improve the attitudes of the front desk staff   The location was great right next to the canal and also a nice little street which is not too busy but has many cool restaurants and cafes The superior room was spacious quiet and had an AC which in this heatwave was wonderful The breakfast has a great variety Decent wifi speed
Early entrance charged with extra fee Check in very late 3 00 p m   Room for one person small but confortable TV with large choice of european channels Modern bathroom Nice staff

we had a pre paid room with a view room was changed for a cheaper one as there were no rooms available but without compensation eventhough we complained we were also charged as a deposit but money was not refounded yet two days later

When we arrived we booked 2 room for 2 adults and 1 kid They wanted to put us in 3 rooms bc they said they dont allow that that this was bookings com fault When I showed them what it was published and that they say they let kids in the room they had no other option that give us 2 rooms instead of 3 But when you are on holidays you dont want that kind of poor attention right Then we said we wanted breakfast they said ok and the following morning we had problems Even the lady at the entrance of the breakfast was threathening us Poor attention That kind of hotel needs better customer service  Great location and great facilities Very nice breakfast room

drugged out kids sleeping on the steps unfriendly staff at check in a very small room no functioning air con a tv very very far away from the bed amazing work as the room was so small but the layout of the room so bad a maid banging at the door at 8am to make up the room and again at 9am  nothing

making an effort to find something to improve I d say its neighbourhood is slightly dodgy however saying that I personally had no problems at all with any neighbours   This was one of the best hotels I ve ever been too Comfortable classy clean and friendly staff

This hotel was in walking distance of all the attractions Tram stop nearby We had a room at the back which was quite small but very clean with a great shower room and overlooked the canal It was very quiet and peaceful The staff were all excellent very friendly and super helpful They were able to give excellent advice about which attractions to visit and how to get to them They were very helpful in sorting out a couple of small personal problems we had on our arrival with items we had forgotten to bring The bed was comfortable and there was a good range of breakfast choices A great stay Would visit again and would recommend to friends

The room wallpaper is from a day gone by but adds to the charm of the experience I suppose   Absolutely 5 star service from the moment we walked in The entire experience room restaurant bar staff was elegant without being pretentious If you want to do Central London you couldn t have nicer more convenient accommodations Not sure how big The Stafford is but it has a very quiet and boutique presence in the middle of London The bed and the bathroom were to die for

we were booked in a standard room wanted a larger room and were willing to pay as well they upgraded us to a junior suite as no other larger room was available for more than 100 GBP to our utter shock we realised that the so called junior suite was located outside the main building on ground floor the junior suite had connectivity issues and no network was available we complained about it as well the duty manager offered to change the room as soon as she could get one but we were not keen to stay in 3 different rooms for 3 nights the duty manager then agreed to waive off the upgrade charges when i asked her to consider our plight she gave a further discount on our stay   the staff at the breakfast venue were very hospitable

Staff really not that friendly or attentive to details nothing like the fabulous staff at the Wellesley Drinks offer as mentioned above only included soft drinks Also worth noting that I was aware the hotel had lots of empty rooms the night we stayed Seems a shame for the staff not to offer a room upgrade even for a small fee   Location ideal Bed very comfy and full size luxury bath previously stayed in the savoy but it only had a tiny bath We were offered a welcome drink But when we got to the bar the staff didn t know anythjng about it After finally getting a manger we were offered a limited selection of soft drinks which was a shame most hotels will include alcoholic and non alcoholic drinks or a cocktail Room was spacious and bed very comfy

There was nothing at all to correct everything was perfect In fact I somehow dropped a precious diamond and sapphire earring without knowing it and when I returned at the end of the day the maid had found it and placed it in a dish on the desk Needless to say I was thrilled and will always trust the Stafford   What a beautiful hotel with excellent staff and an exquisite chef in the restaurant I really do not know what more one could want in central London the outside mews seating for the American Bar is a delight as is the proximity of the Park A wonderful experience all around I come to London 2 3 times per year and will certainly return here

Breakfast is served in two adjoining areas If you are unfortunate you will be given a table in the rear part as we were which has no natural light and is a gloomy place to start the day   The Stafford Hotel is situated in St James s Place a small and quiet street immediately off St James s Street It is an ideal location and had the bonus of allowing us to step out of the front door into Green Park for the start of our early morning walk The staff were friendly and the hotel was exactly what we wanted

The property is very nicely maintained but tired Regarding the room part of the view was a tile wall across an alley We had what was billed as an upgraded king room which was so small that it did not have room to place a suitcase on a rack It was difficult to get from the far side of the bed to the door bathroom There was only one useable drawer The tub was elevated and doubled as shower It was dangerously difficult to stand in it The finishes were dated and for example the lamps were just plain cheap I do not think that the hotel qualifies as five star based on the rooms   The staff is excellent helpful and friendly

I love everything about this hotel   From the moment you arrived the staff were warm and welcoming Our room was beautifully decorated and a good size with a luxurious bathroom and the most comfortable bed and pillows I have ever experienced The American Bar has so much atmosphere and is a wonderful location to meet other guests and other city workers as a guest of the hotel you can reserve a table and eat from an extensive bar menu if you wanted a more informal evening The main restaurant has just recently been refurbished and is beautiful a great improvement on their original design with great music not too loud and a delicious new menu to boot The location is quiet but still only a 10 15 min walk to the National Art Gallery

The room was a little tight really The bathroom really needs a do over mouldy grouting mastic For a place that costs around 280 per night should be better maintained Main gripe would be the breakfast 31 for the breakfast is pretty steep I d say Yes you can have fruit croissants and fry up fish eggs florentine etc but really how much can you eat for 31 The cherry on the top of the 31 was the 2x service charges that they pop onto the bill at the end which you can red facedly ask them to take off but lets face it not many would One charge at 13 per day and another at around 7 per day Bringing the daily cost of breakfast to 82 for 2 people which I think is rather galling Shame As the 31 was enough to bare to begin with   A lovely quiet discrete hotel tucked away behind Green Park Staff very kind attentive and helpful Healthy sort of fry up Very squishy yet comfy bed Super sheets and pillows

For over 1000 per night I would have expected better service I ordered a pot of tea to be delivered to the lounge area which I had been told was available and no one seemed to know how to accomplish that After 20 minutes it still hadn t arrived When I asked about it it was obvious that the order had been lost and it was another 10 minutes for it to arrive There was no outlet in the bathroom for a hair dryer They had special plugs for electric razors but the hair dryer furnished by the hotel couldn t be plugged in I had to use it in the bedroom which was disruptive to family members who were still trying to sleep A light bulb was out in the bathroom and no one noticed for a couple of days Even with all light bulbs burning the lighting in the bathroom was terrible It was so dark it was difficult to put on makeup There was a New Year s Eve event in the restaurant which overflowed into the lounge area for hotel guests We came back to relax for a while between dinner and fireworks and had to sit it our room for over 2 hours since we couldn t use the hotel s public spaces This is my fourth trip to London and I will be returning to the hotel I have stayed in before Won t be back   Bed was the most comfortable hotel bed I have ever slept in Location was fabulous during the daytime

Wonderful view of tower bridge Go downstairs and eat drink and or sit by the Themes Staff were very accommodating and friendly Bed was comfortable And they provide washcloths A bonus when traveling nowadays We paid 160 pounds same price we paid for another London hotel without the location or comfort

Having to check out We ordered two things from the brasserie drinks and entrees Both they got wrong   THE VIEW OMG I thought the view of the bridge would mean I wold see a brick or a square inch NOPE I saw the whole thing I almost didn t leave my room as the view was SPECTACULAR Upon check in we were greeted by a porter who took our heavy luggage We then had it delivered to our room The apples at the desk were a welcome relief to our hunger from travelling all day and not stopping for food Which we immediately went searching for once I stopped crying at the view from our room We did a reccy around the Tower of London and walked the Tower bridge Came back to have a meal at the brasserie The room was nothing special and could do with a facelift but the linen was crisp and the towels plush

Nothing I was completely happy with everything   Fabulous view Easy to get to on the bus from Euston station Very pleasant friendly receptionist Breakfast was an extra 12 00 each but we were seated in a very nice quiet cool part of the breakfast room and there was a good choice of hot and cold breakfast foods Bed was very comfortable and best of all we could open the windows and because it was on the river side of the property it was quiet overnight Excellent choice of eateries nearby for dinner

n a  Very spacious room had the perfect view of the Tower Bridge Executive room 581 Comfortable bed Bathroom floor had heating which was a bonus Great Staff The room also included complimentary club lounge access

I think there should be more options for breakfast as there is a set price of 12 which includes everything Very good unless you just want a light breakfast then there is no option

We did not like waiting for a lift at peak times but having said that we did not make use of the alternative lifts available at the hotel   The room was spacious enough for our needs and well equipped with ironing board iron hairdryer and flat screen t v as well as bathing robes and slippers toiletries and tea coffee making facilities The hotel had free wifi and there was also free car parking with executive rooms The view of the yachts from our room was pleasant and we were given the option of paying 10 extra per room to have a view of the bridge We did not choose breakfast included in the cost of the room when we initially booked the rooms but were happy to pay 12 per breakfast during our stay as there was so much choice between continental and english breakfast items served buffet style and tea coffee brought to the table All staff were friendly and polite The bar on the floor above reception was spacious and well stocked We originally chose the hotel because it was within walking distance of Tower bridge The Shard and the Tower of London the 3 things we wanted to visit Although we checked out of the hotel at 12 noon on our final day we were allowed to leave the car in the hotel car park until we left London at 3pm
outrageous phone charges no coffee maker in room hard to adjust the heating be aware after 7pm you can t eat in the area  excellent wifi good value for breakfast

Breakfast was shockingly poor for a hotel like this I expected better service food and cleanliness it was just a free for all Not impressed at all   Hotel was great got an upgrade too but room was very small as was the bathroom Still nice though

Cant think of anything I didn t like it took me a while to figure out the shower but apart from that I loved it that much I d definitely stay again  I loved the location the bathroom the storage in the room the politeness of the staff and the helpfulness of the consierge
Such a beautiful room comfy bed the only thing was we were in room 161 on first floor would like to have been on the second floor and above as we were overlooking the roof
The hotel was amazing and we had a fantastic view the staff were very friendly and helpful My 50th Birthday soon and the hotel gave us a complimentary bottle of wine
Restaurant for breakfast was small so we needed to wait But only 5 10 mins The bar was only small and quite expensive  Breakfast was very fresh and good produce
My card was authorised twice due to lack of training and still awaiting my money to be available not impressed  The bed super comfy and the view was amazing
Tea coffee in room facilities very Travelodge Hairdryer outdated Bed on opposite was room 239 would allow for a better view  view Staff friendly Room service value

They couldn t find my reservation when I got to the hotel also the bed was a double and the bed was 2 mattresses joined together which I wasn t pleased about for the money I paid  Breakfast was really good value

Sometimes we had to wait quite a long time for the lift when waiting to go down   The location and view was superb overlooking St Katerines Dock We took some champagne to drink in our room as we were celebrating our wedding anniversary but were told that we were welcome to drink this in the lobby and they provided the glasses
Nothing   The location is 2nd to none St Katherine Docks at the back door and Tower Bridge and the restaurant square to the front door Tour Bus stops right by

Perhaps cheaper haha No the location is perfect and I have no complaints whatsoever   Bridge view room was worth the extra money Breakfast was fantastic Staff all attentive Excellent concierge service

The hotel has a lot of carpeting and therefore some dust in the air although we found it otherwise very clean The room starts to show signs of its age   Exactly what I was expecting Great view over Tower Bridge paid extra to get that view Great location for our needs Tower Hill Station and DLR closeby Very confortable bed Restaurants coffee places and supermarket closeby

Given the location it can be a bit busy when walking to and from the hotel which can be a little irritating at times I think the hotel could do a little more to provide luxury rather than just depending on location e g provide robes and slippers better quality coffee and tea facilities in the room and luxury toiletries in the bathroom   The location of the hotel boasts iconic views I especially love Tower Bridge at night St Katherine s Dock is a lovely spot with lots of nice places to eat and a really nice feel For a large central hotel it is surprisingly quiet and calm

Only a minor niggle but couldn t get the air con to work properly as the room was quite warm So just opened the windows   Good sized room with excellent view of tower bridge Can t comment on the food as we didn t eat at the hotel room only Excellent location and would definitely stay there again
The decor in the bedrooom was a little tired   The view of Tower Bridge was excellent Very close to Tower Hill tube making it a great base for exploring London

The first room we were allocated was extremely small and as I am partially disabled was difficult to get around We were given a complementary upgrade to a family room with a stunning view over the bridge however the room itself was dark old fashioned and looked like it hadn t been decorated since the 1970s Room selection is very important at this hotel as they are far from standard   Excellent location and staff were friendly and helpful Public areas are very well decorated and spacious with some great views over the bridge and marina
A different range of pillows they were all too hard so I didn t sleep well   Being in such a central location and being able to upgrade to an executive room

N A  We came for my husbands birthday which was a suprise for him Staff were friendly and great for giving us a bridge view without paying extra hotel room was comfortable the room was small but cosy the bathroom had underfloor heating and a speaker which was hooked up to the tv very clean room great facilities could not fault our stay Some people said rooms need updating our room was quite modern breakfast were delicious hot plates and hot and cold food buffet plenty to choose from lovely view of the tower bridge attentive staff overall had a lovely great stay my husband enjoyed it very much and said he would definitely return to the same hotel At the back of hotel they had some lovely eateries too

I contacted the hotel to request i pay for the room before we arrived i was informed that i was unable to pay before arrival by reservations then told that i would need to fill out a 3rd party form to enable them to take payment as they could not do this over the telephone AND FINALLY when they had received this form the reservations team member was unable to take the payment as their system did not allow customer not present payments This nightmare went back and forth for 3 days before i finally gave up and paid on arrival When checking in i requested at the front desk to make a full payment and any further charges would be paid when we checked out The receptionist took full payment for both rooms for the full 2 nights Only when we checked out i was informed that this was only AUTHERISED and that the full payment of 2 rooms for 2 nights the balance i had previously paid was due After a brief conversation with the manager he confirmed that a full payment had been autherised and would be completed upon check out Apparently this is a regular mis communication between reception staff and guests So i would be aware that if you are requesting to pay on arrival you will be stunned into silence when they request you pay the full amount AGAIN upon departure   we informed staff that we where staying for my partners fathers 63rd birthday they very kindly left 1 bottle of wine and 1 prosecco in the room with a hand written card such a lovely touch
Coming home   Everything Very clean staff very helpful and polite Food excellent View from room of tower bridge was amazing Can t wait to come back

the bathroom could do with being updated but it was useable and clean  the view from our room was AMAZING Bed was really comfortable and the staff were really Friendly I got a complimentary bottle of wine for my birthday which was a really nice touch
Above  Didn t have food at all Brilliant view from the window Not enough people working on reception That was the poorest thing Very friendly bar and wonderful location

poor reception service staff being trained but not supervised loose towel rail in bathroom poor lighting partner couldnt see to do make up no bedside cabinet on one side heating didnt work TV quality poor room very small and looked tired partner couldnt turn shower on or off as knob to big and stiff fridge bot very cool wardrobe lights stayed on when doors closed and we like total darkness to sleep when checking out just told to put key cards in slot and not asked how our stay had been poor bar facility   location
Location was excellent We had a room with a view of the bridge which was great Staff went above and beyond Will be making this my hotel of choice whenever coming to London

Bar closed earlier than stated Poor wifi connection at times The hot tap took a long time to run hot in the bathroom Felt I was wasting water   The view from the room Water in room The hotel was very nice overall The porters were very helpful and friendly Good choice at breakfast and well cooked
The only downside to the hotel room was the lack of channels on the tv reception wasn t that great for late night viewing   Very clean helpful staff

Staff in the first floor breakfast room were a bit glum   Given that this hotel is not in the city it s location is great Wonderful views great restaurants nearby and it s not in the Congestion Zone Also they have on site parking although there is plenty nearby

Trying to locate the hotel from the road was tricky sat nav mislead us Fridge in room was locked so we could not store our own food   comfy beds windows open slightly for fresh air clean room views of the thames

The hotel staff were as always amazingly friendly and helpful It was our friend s birthday she was given a lovely birthday card wine and chocolates by the hotel what a lovely touch We had requested rooms overlooking the river and although these cost a little extra it is well worth it The view is amazing both day and night

Paid 200 deposit for incidentals which is taken off credit card even if there is no spending in hotel then you wait for refund to go through a few days later Most hotels just keep imprint of credit card   Fantastic location and comfortable stay even though our room was small

I was rudely asked not to help myself to alcoholic beverages from the fridge in the executive lounge at 4 50pm as this was not allowed until 5pm and my actions would cause others to want a drink early I apologised that I hadn t realised is was not yet 5pm as 1 the gentleman opposite me had a bottle of beer and 2 the fridge was not locked otherwise how would I have got the bottle out The waiter clearly unimpressed walked away to check the fridge obviously finding it to indeed be unlocked He then reluctantly appogised explaining that he would allow me to keep my drink as a member of staff not him must have opened it For my remaining time in the lounge this waiter did not come back to my table and walked around looking clearly annoyed Which I found a little rude and silly Also the following morning the information stated muffins cookies and fruit would be available in the lounge from 11 2pm When I left the lounge at 11 30 these were yet to seen After my experience the previous night I didn t dare to ask the waiter   Amazing location with beautiful views of Tower Bridge and St Catherine s Docks The exclusive club lounge had a great selection of drinks and refreshments on offer Check in was a breeze even on a busy Saturday afternoon The bed was amazing I did not want to get up Our executive twin room was clean and very well equipped The complimentary mini bar and coffee machine was a great touch
seemed only 2 lifts ever worked   bed excellent tidiness good staff excellent breakfast good enjoyed sitting in the bar in the evening looking at the view

The bar was very busy later on Saturday evening get there early if you want a seat near the window to view the Thames all lit up at night   The hotel has a lovely aroma when you arrive which is very relaxing The staff are friendly and informative The beds were so comfortable too and our shower was powerful without being forceful A very pleasant couple of nights in a smashing hotel we ll definitely use it again

The price but it s London   Location and quality of room Difficult to say more as we just slept there and did not use any of the facilities beyond the room preferring to eat and drink out It merited it s 4 star rating and we would not hesitate to stay again at the right price
The hotel suffers from poor exterior architecture and needs renovation to the bedrooms It was built in 1975 and needs a facelift   The wonderful view from our room and from the bar on the first floor
Maybe the option to have basic food options toasties paninis etc   Stayed here before Fantastic hotel prime location really good facilities with helpful and friendly staff

Shower was poor head room water pressure and scratched bath complimentary mini bar contained bare minimum room was smaller than expected for a suite and views were slightly blocked by side of hotel when bridge view was highlighted as highest importance   The hotel itself inside was nice and facilities such the exec lounge were good
The breakfast set up was too manic no hot drinks station or good continuity with the food counters bit like being in a market   Location and reasonably priced breakfast
Bath was dirty Room was so hot could barely sleep air conditioning didn t work only blasted hot air bed was like sleeping on a rock   The view was good and the staff were great
You managed to charge us for breakfast when it had been paid for by my friends which turned out a little embarrassing I m sure you will sort it out with them   Most everything

Pillows were uncomfy but that s just personal pickiness And the shower head was slightly low 6ft2in and have to stoop in most hotel bathrooms   Friendly staff quick check in quiet room with fantastic view Superb room service fast and delicious Room was well appointed and clean and surprisingly roomy given it s location

I arrived during the day as is common on a business visit The hotel refused to release any rooms for checkin until 3pm This was very inflexible and completely unnecessary as many rooms would have been cleaned throughout the morning I was very dissatisfied with this

The room was clean but badly in need of an update Cracks in the hand basin furniture badly marked The toilet needed bleaching   We didn t manage to get into breakfast e tried twice the queues were to long Only one breakfast room available although it did say there would be two Bed very comfy

Hotel bar prices ouch needs new check in software second time I had check in problems That s about it   Brilliant location great views front and rear car park very handy not free Friendly helpful staff good restaurant nice coffee bar with morning croissants for those who don t want full breakfast Got a good price deal

A bit close to the lifts so slightly disburbed by lift voice TV was on a rather low table so not a good viewable angle Few easy access power sockets had to unplug phone charger to boil kettle Minor issues only really   The bed was very comfortable The bathroom was well presented and clean hot water was almost instant Despite not being a bridge view the view from the large windows was still very good Checkin out was smooth and the staff friendly

The bar area was so full that we couldnt get in In my mind this means that it is too small for the hotel   The room was lovely and our room overlooked St Katharines Docks which was beautufully decorated with Christmas decorations and lights
the breakfast it was lovely but had a little bit of a sore stomach after it   The view from our room was amazing I love the hotel the staff were so helpful and attentive 100 would come back

We asked for a thames and tower bridge view and had a confirmation of this however on check in we were not allocated a thames tower view which was hugely disappointing as my wife was eagerly looking forward to this aspect of the stay  Wine and chocolates in our room for my wife s birthday was an excellent touch very much appreciated My wife forgot to bring a brush but again the hotel came to the rescue thank you again Hotel bar is a real asset with its stunning location

mattresses on the twin beds were too hard for my liking but thats just my preference   fabulous location staff were great also has a car park which was essential for us difficult to find any fault will definitely return
My twin bed rolled and I had to push it against the wall to stop that Comfy bed though   The staff were helpful the view and location outstanding nespresso in room was great good value

Breakfast as pretty awful really sub standard After breakfast not prepared to risk brasserie They need to think seriously about the quality of food on offer  River boat from Westminster stops right at door Marvellous

I was charged twice for my room which took 9 days to refund no apology Order food in the evening to my room and even though there is a tray charge someone added a tip on top of it   The view from the hotel was amazing That was probably the best part of the hotel
We thought the bathrooms could do with updating but still good   We liked absolutely everything The rooms view of the bridge friendlyness of staff the food was amazing

Hotel rooms were more worn out than expected water damage visible to ceiling bathroom had nicks and scratches that could have been easily repaired No one answered when calling front desk guest services Our room was very warm and we had to go down to front desk to talk to anyone Can not recommend this hotel   Location is great if you want to be near Tower Bridge and the Tower
The phone in the bathroom had some silicone on it a small issue but it all counts when paying for such an expensive room  I was in the executive suite the view of the tower bridge was amazing

Can t think of anything at all loved it great way to spend Christmas  Good size well appointed rooms lovely friendly staff good facilities bar coffee lounge restaurants Lovely views over the Thames and Tower bridge

our 3 day stay we could not of asked for better for our price room very nice and had all the essentials required in the room very comfy and our view looking over st Katherine s dock we will return again in 2017 food very nice especially starting the day off with a full stomach at breakfast location of the hotel is good for the underground Tower Gate DLR London Bridge all walking distance

Nothing  We booked over a month ago and only paid for a standard room We arrived and were greeted with an awesome bridge view that was equally amazing when getting room service breakfast brought to you so you can eat and look at the iconic Tower Bridge

No safe I think it was away getting fixed   We were upgraded free of charge to an executive room Beautiful views Free mini bar Very clean and good bed
can t think of anything else   the best view of the tower bridge that after posting pictures on Facebook lots of friends and relatives were inspired by it

The room was very small not really suitable for 2 people The heating didn t work so they eventually gave us a heater The heating didn t come on to 6 at night which wouldn t be very satisfactory if weather was very cold  The bed very comfortable view outstanding bar staff very friendly and though we hadn t stayed there for a little while they remembered us

bed placed in corner of room due to the size of the room had to climb over the bed this was the only fault with our stay we will return in the new year   bed very comfortable reception staff very polite

No check in before 3pm despite requesting with booking and arriving 10am from night flight No effort made by staff to be helpful simply told to come back in 5 hours Paid for Tower bridge View room didnt receive this Room was small dark and dated Reception staff rude and unhelpful Overall Poor Value and Bad Service from the hotel Better to book any other hotel at Tower Hill including Nivotel Doubtree Grange etc
Couldnt find our booking had to wait a while at reception but we got a free breakfast for the inconvenience   Bed very comfortable Great view Lovely stay

The whole experience was amazing from the views to the staff Nothing was too much trouble the best Hotel I have stayed in and I want to return soon
I  Beautiful location breathtaking views and young lady allocated a room with gorgeous views as it was my partner s birthday had a memorable trip

1 Overcrowded queue for being attended at the reception it took us an hour and a half to make check inn queue for the elevator for the breakfast 2 Quite a long walk with stairs up and stairs down to the nearest underground station 3 We have been double charged for our room They said havn t been noticed by booking com about the prepayment even though I showed them the confirmation Only after 5 days of trying to fix it and spending hours in front of the reception we have been told that it was a mistake and we will be refunded

The view and location are fantastic but that s already been covered by everyone else What I wanted to highlight was the receptionists who were extremely nice My friend and I had three different bookings for 7 days These were three different types of rooms When we got there I checked if they can arrange just one room for us so we don t have to move to different rooms during our stay I knew the rooms had different rates but they gave us a fantastic twin room with a nice view The lady at the check in counter was very accommodating If I ever go back to London I would definitely stay there again

Great view from our room breakfast was good standard for food Staff were efficient but could smile more Arrival reception was very lovely and really went the extra mile Room was extreamly small and small bed but view was great Room was ok for one night but I wouldn t of been able to do a longer stay

I would just say the rooms are very small It was hard for 2 people to be getting ready in the same room   The staff was so lovely Requested a room with a view as i bought the trip to london as a surprise for my partners birthday and it was the first time he was vositing london Our view was fantastic and they gave us a bottle of wine Rooms comfy clean and view is spectaculor

Whole place is a bit dated its not that its tired and dated it s been looked after but could do with losing that 90 s look inside and coming into the 21st century   Great Views if you get the right room

Nothing comes to mind  Really good location for river taxi to all areas walking distance from tube stn brilliant breakfast Lovely view of tower bridge Good size room Comfy bed Tesco express next door Lovely eateries around the docks and beautiful boats to look at

Room was a bit cool and not obvious how to warm it up TV channels were limited and reception not great gave up after a while   Reception area was very pretty and reception staff friendly Brasserie was lovely too Rooms were very comfortable and nicely presented Shower was hot and powerful

Couldn t get wifi smaller room than we ve had before but still comfortable  We love the hotel in general and have been coming here for many years and in particular we love the location

The room was tiny Also we had a room right opposite the lifts so was constantly woken by people coming in and out of the lifts  Location is great and the decor is lovely

No complaints   We have stayed at The Tower on numerous occasions and always have found the overall standards to be extremely good The position is excellent as is the car park We shall continue to return

little bit too keen to take credit cards and money Lobby and public areas in need of some TLC to bring up to standard   Location and view of Tower Bridge easy tube access Plenty of places to eat nearby Room though small as was price was modern and clean Comfortable and very good wi fi I was on 5th floor which was newly refurbished

Room was on the small side but had a fab view and was otherwise perfect   Fab location right next to tower bridge 5min walk to nearest tube station and across the river is butlers wharf with lots of restaurants and bars Stayed for my boyfriends birthday and got upgraded to a tower view room which was amazing

Coffee machine problems in room and nobody came to fix it Also we paid for upgrade to club but we re not given bathrobes which would have been nice Limited drinks in mini bar   Lovely staff very welcoming and quick no question at check in also quick to seat you fro breakfast Very good with luggage storage to speedy and polite Lovely view from room of Tower Bridge

5 charge to deliver room service AND limited choice after 11pm We would have liked cheese biscuits but it wasn t available after 11pm but cooked items were It didn t seem to make sense   Super friendly staff We had a room facing tower bridge which was fantastic We stayed here 2 years ago and our room faced St Katherine s Dock which was also lovely but the view this time couldn t have been better

The beds could have softer Could have been quicker booking in instead of queuing  Very close to tower bridge Tower of London Location not so good for west end Lovely staff Upgrade well worth the money Would use again

Person I was with found a bug catcher under the matress where the pillows were Not what you wanna see in your bed   Great brekfast and comfy beds great location

Just a little bit of noise frm City airport flights  A perfect location for our planned Medieval banqyet in the vaults The Xi bar had a superb view of Tower Bridge and the Thames Srinjs were quite expensive but not outrageous The room was a bit small but average for London
Bug trap behind the pillows under the mattress Massive disappointment Mentioned to receptionist on checkout   Bed extra comfy Food lovely staff helpful rest of room clean and well presented

The hotel is very old and we called the recipien asking how to turn the heat on and we were surprised that they only have cooling AC andy so they sent us a separate old heater   Friendly staff and location

I had booked two separate rooms however only one booking was registered on arrival WIFI is slow Iron did not work in my room Room service never arrived with my power socket converter UK EU so I had to go down at pick it up my self   Location is excellent

As before mentioned a King Size bed would have been nice but is hardly a complaint   The room was excellent and very clean Our room was River View so we expected a decent bed and were not disappointed The only improvement would have been a King Size bed but I realise the space is limited The bathing facilities are also top class and very clean The location is 1st class as St Katherine Docks and the surrounding area are all of a superior standard We have stayed with you several times and it has always been a pleasurable experience The staff are all very helpful and efficient and made our time with you a delight

Awful customer service at check in told we didn t have a reservation Also claimed we hadn t booked paid for breakfast Afternoon tea reservation wasn t put in the diary so no booking for that either Disgraceful service entire stay

Fantastic view of Tower bridge Complementary wine and chocolates and greeting card to celebrate our Anniversary Loved the location and the fact that St Katherine s pier gave us easy access to boat trips Friendly staff throughout from customer service reception concierge breakfast staff My second stay here and my favourite London hotel I will be back

Poor check in was told on arrival we weren t booked for the night even though we had the confirmation from booking com and we where made to pay for the night stay when we checked in even though it said pay on check out or we could leave the hotel disappointing this happen spoke to the reception manger in the morning about it and they did apologise  The hotel location is great for sight seeing and river cruise right outside bed was really comfy room on the small side but fine as we only stayed 1 night
NA  We were upgraded to an executive room for a small price The room was fantastic as well as all the facilities The view was absolutely breathtaking and we ll never stay anywhere else again

The room was too small for a double it seemed to be a single room with a double bed squeezed in additionally ithad not been renovated for many years very old appliances and furniture etc   The location was excellent with fantastic views of Tower Bridge

Staff were so lovely and accommodating Room was fab we felt very spoilt when reception left wine and chocolates to celebrate our Silver Wedding and birthdays Thank you for a romantic and memorable stay in your hotel Perfect location

Bed in hotel war quite uncomfortable room was small we couldn t pass each out her at the bottom of bed without standing to one side but the view made up for this  Location lots of places to around the area to eat very handy for tube to any where very clean area felt very safe out at night over all a good weekend

Badly planned took a room without a view of Tower Bridge Only planned one night stay as easy do longer here NOTHING to NOT like   There are some places in life you may feel hard done by and pay for Location this is not one of those as for what I did pay would have paid more This was one of my better Hotels to visit as is in a position where everything is already Perfect I am a moan and like all that I pay for as I would sell Perfect in every way The Tower Hotel has this if anything was wrong with this Hotel it would be here I went for a smoke and took about two hours and 100 pics What is GOOD about this Hotel is so much is on the doorstep Last words I hope you are booking now as I already planning next visit The Burger in pic is if I recall correct 8oz of Pure Angus Beef nomm nomm still

Nothing that we didn t like Only tiny improvement could have been some herbal teas in the bedroom but absolutely nothing else   From the moment we arrived we were met and dealt with from friendly professional helpful staff The beds were fab the view was amazing the breakfast had a great selection

Due to the poor wet evening we ate in the Brasserie which was very disappointing No atmosphere rather clinical atmosphere and not very warm due to draughts from the air con   the stunning panoramic view from our 5th floor room overlooking Tower Bridge The breakfasts in the 5th floor club

The room was incredibly small for 2 people room 509 as was the bed It was also noisy as people congregated outside it for the lift   Very polite and attentive staff
Had access to executive lounge but found they run out of everything if you don t get in there early including cups spoons etc   Reception staff very helpful and friendly Clean and comfortable

I called to book a room and was told the hotel was full I was told that I would not be able to book online due to being full but I had no problem getting a room

Absolutely nothing They loved the whole experience   Excellent friendly welcome by a charming receptionist Lady I am so sorry I did not get her name I bought this as a gift for my Sister and her Husband and they absolutely loved the experience as they did the last time I treated them to a night at this hotel They had total comfort They were given a Beautiful room and slept all night with the curtains open to enjoy the Beautiful view of Tower Bridge I will certainly book for next year again for this Hotel as a gift Well done and Thank you

It s the perfect place to stay if you want to be out of the hubbub of the city but still be a part of it Great views over the Thames and Tower Bridge and a morning s wander around St Katherine s Dock is a bonus

Horrendous problem when 1 booking of four wasn t found we signed in showed bank statement to prove pre payment of room but you still text me twice on leaving to ask me why we didn t show And recharged us even though you were shown bank payment We have not had any apology since from you regarding this spoilt wedding anniversary trip   lovely views across the river and of the bridge

The air con could have been better   Very welcoming attentive members of staff We we re able to leave our luggage at the hotel free of charge even though our stay had come to an end this gave us extra time to enjoy more of London

Nothing everything was wonderful   Lovely hotel wonderful view of Tower Bridge from our room and a lovely birthday surprise sent to our room chocolates wine and birthday card Love this place we will be back
We didn t not like anything but if I had to say one thing maybe the bed could of been a bit bigger and more than one shower gel for two people  We liked the view from the room and location

Would have liked plug sockets closer to the bed the only negative I could think of   Comfortable bed everything we needed in room Perfect location for central London Very accommodating staff The view from our room was fabulous see the photo below

An extra day s stay   The view of my wife s favourite tower was perfect Booking an executive room was worth every penny The staff especially Ferdinando excellent

Manager was very kind bottle of wine in room to celebrate our 50th wedding anniversary and complimentary breakfasts included it was also my birthday same day 6 8 16 great weekend
not able to stream my own device to the television as the remote was tied down  The bed was lovely and comfy with great pillows which are hard to find nowadys

Our room with a view of the bridge was only if you looked left but as we got a special deal on price and we only stayed one night it didn t bother us that much Truthfully it was a view of the air conditioning unit with the bridge thrown in Room 133   The location right next to The Tower of London and Tower Pier was excellent The breakfast was good Reception staff very welcoming and friendly

nothing everything was great   I stay at this hotel every time we stay in London at least 5 times a year for a couple of days at a time it is ideally situated next to Tower Bridge the staff are always very friendly and helpful rooms are clean and comfortable excellent Hotel

Toilet bowl water was dirty when we arrived but was cleaned immediately after it was reported The complementary bottles of water could not be cooled or kept cool   Staff exceptionally helpful and professional both face to face and on the phone The room was clean and well maintained throughout our stay The view of Tower Bridge the river and riverside from the room was magnificent both day and night St Katherine s wharf next door was a revelation
The rooms were a little too small for 3 people   The location was perfect The room had a view of London Bridge which was spectacular The hotel was clean and the beds were comfy
Although my room was good value with a great view It s decor was tired and the carpet was grubby and needed cleaning   Excellent location with friendly and helpful staff

Room quite small Booked for my friends special Birthday but no mention made in room or by reception staff I decorated the room to mark the occasion   Comfy bed and clean room Location perfect for exploring London
The check in desk was very chaotic and the staff didn t seem to know what they were doing Long queues for the lifts   The view of the river and Tower bridge us spectacular

Faultless really Another biscuit might have been nice though   Everything was pefect liked everything except for check in which was long and slow but probably due to the Clipper Racers returning to St Kathryns
No criticism  Great room Amazing view of Tower Bridge Birthday card wine and macaroons in room I was impressed Top notch to the Tower Team Thank you

Bar was shut from 1 00 a m even to residents which was a real shame when you have headed back to your hotel for a final nightcap Who gets in before 1 on a night out in Town   Taken in isolation the external impression of the hotel is not as impressive as many other locations in London however inside it is great the location is fabulous and the proximity of all of the other astounding architecture completely changes your impression Great place to use as a base camp for exploring north and south of the river with the added benefit of all the other activities going on around St Katherine s Dock

Check in process was abysmal Did not expect to arrive at hotel and to have to queue from outside the front door Took half an hour to be seen and then at that point the member of staff on reception told us that our room had been cancelled we had certainly not cancelled it it took her several attempts to sort it out and despite us asking to see a manager we re still waiting perhaps a manager intends to call and visit us at our home address The experience of having to queue for 20 minutes in order to get our breakfast was not particularly inspiring either at check in we had been advised that there would be two restaurants open for breakfast as the hotel was obviously busy and seemingly unable to cope with so many guests it seemed that they were hosting a staff event for Top Shop Top Man but in the end there was only one restaurant open and it was chaotic This along with the check in experience left a poor impression of the hotel   Bed was very comfy views from the room were spectacular good location for underground etc
Vegetarian sausages at breakfast maybe tomatoes mushroom   Breakfast was wonderful and fresh croissant fruit coffee scrambled egg smoked salmon fantastic choice

Room was clean towels changed regularly but room could have been bigger   Brilliant views from the room Bed was really luxurious Staff were professional helpful and friendly Lots of choice at breakfast and system was well organised even though it was very busy

Breakfast and bar prices a little expensive   The views from this hotel are amazing The rooms are large and comfortable Location good for visiting tourist attractions Staff polite and helpful On site parking is available

Room service didn t do pizza all night Who doesn t love pizza  Great service and great location Stunning views and extremely good value for money Upgraded stay when arrived and was worth every penny Look forward to returning and would definitely recommend it

Nothing  Only used the hotel as an overnight stay but would definitely use it again We were on a budget but we did not feel like it when we arrived The room was more than an adequate for 1 night and everything worked All staff were very polite and helpful

Check in was chaotic We never came into the hotel without encountering a waiting line The evening we arrived there seemed to be issues with lots of booking as people were complaining about wrong room assignments all around us In the middle of it all we were informed that the Bridge view room we had paid for was not available and we were offered a Twin We refused as we wanted a double and eventually they got us a standard double room We were then offered a complimentary upgrade to an Executive Bridge room for our 2nd night which was most welcome In fairness the view from the standard room out over the docks behind the hotel was lovely The 2nd night in the exec room was really great and the club lounge was a very nice touch But overall they really need to work on their front desk operations staff were lovely but too often there wasn t enough of them available I saw many guests getting irate and demanding more staff be brought out to alleviate the Queues   Best location in London Right at foot of Tower Bridge and Tower of London and with St Katherine s Docks behind it we were spoiled for choices of restaurants shops bars and things to do A hopper pas for Big Bus Tours gave us freedom to use the stop at tower of London as a commuter service to downtown lor we could just walk out of our hotel and take the boat instead if we chose At the front entrance on the river is a lawn area with food trucks and a bar with lots of seating all around a perfect spot to watch London go by whilst sipping a cocktail and eating pizza or traditional English fare

A bit of a shame to complain but the room was a little cramped not enough room for two bedside tables Surprised that the bar shut at 12 30 even though there were quite a few people still in it   One of the best hotels we ve stayed in in London Perfect location with great views of the docks from our room and Tower Bridge from the bar Plenty of bars and restaurants nearby Hotel immaculate and staff very attentive Would highly recommend We paid 112 00 for a Saturday night considering the luxury of the hotel and surroundings you couldn t do better

Nothing   Fabulous views took a 20 upgrade to a bridge view room and it was worth every penny Breathtaking view of Tower Bridge and surrounding buildings See day night pic Room was spacious we had two rooms one had a double bed one had a Kingsize Full size bath and great shower in each Wide screen tv Staff were excellent super friendly and keen to help Breakfast was 12 a head payable at the time Excellent selection of baked goods cereals fruit cooked meats plus full English and omelettes cooked to order
Great location Fantastic price and even a complimentary bottle of wine for my wife s birthday Would highly recommend to anyone staying in london

No water in executive room as mini bar not stocked until 2nd night but with an executive room should be in there anyway plus tried to check in at 3 30 pm and room not ready not good enough  Location and bar on riverfront great vibe

The cleaner coming in to the room before I could answer the door I was stood there in my pants  The whole trip was great The hotel is in a good spot for London next to the river

Food in the Hotel was not particularly good value and really quite a limited menu Do not like tips automatically put on the bill  Liked the fact that there was a safe and ironing board and excellent view

The toilet had been used before we got into the room and not flushed   The view over London Bridge was amazing we got to see the opening of the bridge and watch the world go by The temperature of the room was perfect Beds were comfortable Tea and coffee facilities were well stocked Great selection of tv channels Free excellent wifi during our stay helped to keep my teenager occupied Safe was useful and the check out time was perfect Location was on point Restaurants on site were perfect and the little tesco was perfect and almost on site for the toothbrushes that we had forgotten All reception and concierge staff were impeccable Thank you so much best hotel I ve ever stayed in

Room was small you couldn t get down side of bed to get in without moving it to an angle Air conditioning didn t work Price of drinks was extortionate   We liked the location brilliant for River Clipper

The curtains were hanging off the rail I had to keep ringing up everyday for a breakfast in your room menu Apparently the staff are supposed to leave one each day but they didn t and I stayed for three nights   The room service was reliable Location was excellent Food was good

The views from the rooms were fabulous The X1 bar area overlooking Tower Bridge especially at night was incredible The standard double bedroom was very adequate for our one night stay A brilliant location with St Katherine Docks on the doorstep

I really loved the view of the Tower Bridge from the hotel Moreover staffs were very kind and friendly If I go to London again I will stay at the Tower A Guoman again
The ironing facilities were poor and food wasn t great Staff seemed like everything was a bit of a hassle even though they were attentive   Good size room adequate facilities and great location
Nothing   Superb location views are stunning whatever room you have staff and hotel facilities are excellent our 3rd visit and will certainly return
need to walk 10 mins to tube  the view of London Tower Bridge is incredible because we are at the corner room which is the closest room to the bridge and is awesome

Queue for checking in 5 minute queue for breakfast just to be seated which seemed like a lot longer when you re in a rush ahead of a meeting Iron didn t work staff only brought a new iron without an ironing board the plug sock didn t reach to the fixed ironing board But after waiting 2o minutes for an iron gave up asking for a board  view location were fantastic I stay in London a lot on business will stay again with my family

Disappointed by housekeeping staff knocking on door to clean room before 8 30am on day of checkout   The view from our room of the docks and the location of the hotel were excellent The staff in reception were very welcoming nothing was too much trouble
Breakfast was a bit chaotic not everything topped up regularly eg fresh juices milk Quality of food very good though  Stayed here many times before always a good experience

A little noisy with doors banging  The room was quite small but it was sufficient for what we needed always handy having tea and coffee in the room Bed very comfy and the breakfast selection was very good

Concierge desk was unstaffed for about 10 minutes while we were waiting to collect our luggage Check in desk is slow during busy times   Lovely breakfast with a lovely view of St Catharine s Dock Great location with a view of the Thames however due to shape of the building no view of Tower bridge

Room nicely furnished individual pieces Great view of Tower Bridge Thames and the Shard Great location Quiet with comfortable bed a good nights sleep

For a room of this price and calibre one would expect the safe to work there to be a mini bar the heated towel rail to be hot bit below par really   View from room Tower bridge

Not for myself had a great stay wish I had been able to stay longer but had to return for work and pets dog and chickens can t wait to return for another stay   Beds so comfy staff so helpfull and professional made you feel like their first ever customer left some personnel belongings on checking out was called and my belongings returned consierge service excellent

Couldn t control the air conditioning and cold tap would also run hot water sometimes   Location perfect and view over St Katharine s dock was tremendous Staff very helpful
